title: Grok Tesla: Expansion to Europe and Asia Reported
description: Recent reports indicate Tesla is expanding Grok availability to Europe and Asia, including specific updates for Belgium and the Netherlands, alongside new voice assistant features.

sources.title: Tesla Is Expanding Grok to All of Europe and More of Asia
Grok arrives in Belgian and Dutch Teslas with the summer update
Tesla to roll out AI-powered Grok voice assistant, self-driving stat sharing

sections.heading: Expansion to Europe and Asia
paragraphs: According to Not a Tesla App, Tesla is expanding Grok to all of Europe and more of Asia.

sections.heading: Regional Updates
paragraphs: AutoNext.co reports that Grok arrives in Belgian and Dutch Teslas with the summer update.

sections.heading: New Features
paragraphs: Proactive financial news states that Tesla is set to roll out an AI-powered Grok voice assistant and self-driving stat sharing.

faq.a: AutoNext.co reports that Grok arrives in Belgian and Dutch Teslas with the summer update.

faq.q: What new features are associated with Grok?
faq.a: Proactive financial news indicates that Tesla will roll out an AI-powered Grok voice assistant and self-driving stat sharing.
